headline: Trump's Birthday UFC Event Faces More Pressure: Netflix Just Set MMA Viewership Record
summary: President Donald Trump wants a huge UFC fight in June at the White House to celebrate his birthday and the country. Netflix may have already overshadowed the big event.

raw.headline: Trump's Birthday UFC Event Faces More Pressure: Netflix Just Set MMA Viewership Record

headline: 3 Consumer Stocks We Keep Off Our Radar
summary: Consumer discretionary businesses are levered to the highs and lows of economic cycles. Over the past six months, it seems like demand may be facing some headwinds as the industry’s 3.9% return has lagged the S&P 500 by 9.5 percentage points.

raw.headline: 3 Consumer Stocks We Keep Off Our Radar
raw.summary: Consumer discretionary businesses are levered to the highs and lows of economic cycles. Over the past six months, it seems like demand may be facing some headwinds as the industry’s 3.9% return has lagged the S&P 500 by 9.5 percentage points.

headline: Authentic Brands Group expects IPO in next 12 months, founder tells CNBC
summary: Jamie Salter, founder and executive chairman at Authentic Brands Group, joins ‘Squawk on the Street’ to discuss the reasoning behind Matt Maddox becoming the new CEO, his plans for going public, upcoming deals in the making, and more.

raw.headline: Authentic Brands Group expects IPO in next 12 months, founder tells CNBC
raw.summary: Jamie Salter, founder and executive chairman at Authentic Brands Group, joins ‘Squawk on the Street’ to discuss the reasoning behind Matt Maddox becoming the new CEO, his plans for going public, upcoming deals in the making, and more.
